MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-24-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JUAN PALOS-ALFEREZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. MARGO SEELY, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER, WITH OATH ON FILE, PRESENT AND ASSISTED DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ANDREW CHENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
